---
title: "IL1B sequencing paper: finalized analysis"
output:
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
editor_options:
  markdown:
    wrap: 72
---

```{r setup, include = F}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)

# tidyverse
library(tidyverse)

# custom helpers
source("modules/helpers.R")
```

```{r setup core tc dataframes}

# related to il1b-bud-timecourse/modules/dea-cleanup.R

tc_dea <- read_tsv("data/raw/A549_IL1B_Bud_tc_univariateDEA.txt") %>%
  mutate(sig = case_when(
    log2fold <= -1 & FDR <= 0.05 ~ "dn",
    log2fold >=  1 & FDR <= 0.05 ~ "up",
    TRUE ~ "ns"
  )) %>%
  group_by(Gene, treatment) %>%
  mutate(
    peak = time[which.max(abs(log2fold))],
    peak_sig = sig[which(time == peak)]) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    time = factor(time, levels = c(1, 2, 6, 12, 24)),
    peak = factor(peak, levels = c(1, 2, 6, 12, 24)),
    sig = factor(sig, levels = c("up", "dn", "ns")),
    peak_sig = factor(peak_sig, levels = c("up", "dn", "ns")),
    treatment = factor(treatment, levels = c("NS", "IL1B", "Bud", "I+B"))
  )

tc_tpm <- read_tsv("data/raw/A549_IL1B_Bud_tc_tpm.txt") %>%
  mutate(
    time = factor(time, levels = c(1, 2, 6, 12, 24)),
    treatment = factor(treatment, levels = c("NS", "IL1B", "Bud", "I+B"))
  )
```

```{r fig 1a, fig.height=2.5, fig.width=2}
df = tc_dea %>%
  filter(treatment == "IL1B" & sig != "ns") %>%
  select(Gene, sig) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  count(sig)

ggplot(df, aes(x = sig, y = n)) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), vjust = -1) +
  theme(aspect.ratio = 2.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.2)))
```

```{r fig 1b, fig.height=2.5, fig.width=3}
df = tc_dea %>%
  filter(treatment == "IL1B" & peak_sig != "ns") %>%
  select(Gene, peak_sig, peak) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  count(peak_sig, peak)

ggplot(df, aes(x = peak, y = n)) +
  facet_wrap(~peak_sig) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), vjust = -1) +
  theme(aspect.ratio = 1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.2)))

cleanup_objects()
```

```{r fig 1c, fig.height=2.5, fig.width=3}

# related to il1b-bud-timecourse/modules/pca.R

# identify genes
goi = tc_dea %>%
  filter(treatment == "IL1B" & sig != "ns") %>%
  pull(Gene) %>%
  unique()

# prep matrix
mat = tc_tpm %>%
  filter(
    Gene %in% goi,
    treatment %in% c("NS", "IL1B")
  ) %>%
  mutate(sample = paste(treatment, time, rep)) %>%
  select(Gene, sample, log2tpm) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = "sample", values_from = "log2tpm") %>%
  column_to_rownames("Gene") %>%
  as.matrix()

# run pca
pca <- prcomp(t(mat), center = TRUE, scale. = FALSE)

# convert pca output to df
pca_df <- as.data.frame(pca$x) %>%
  rownames_to_column("sample") %>%
  separate(sample, into = c("treatment","time","rep"), sep = " ") %>%
  mutate(
    treatment = factor(treatment, levels = c("NS", "IL1B")),
    time = factor(time, levels = c(1, 2, 6, 12, 24))
  )

# compute replicate-level distances from NS
# check this !!!
pca_distance <- pca_df %>%
  select(treatment, rep, time, PC1, PC2) %>%
  left_join(
    pca_df %>%
      filter(treatment == "NS") %>%
      select(rep, time, PC1, PC2) %>%
      rename(PC1_NS = PC1, PC2_NS = PC2),
    by = c("rep", "time")
  ) %>%
  filter(treatment != "NS") %>%
  mutate(
    dist = sqrt(
      (PC1 - PC1_NS)^2 + (PC2 - PC2_NS)^2
    )
  ) %>%
  select(treatment, time, rep, dist)

ggplot(pca_df, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = time, shape = treatment)) +
  theme(
    aspect.ratio = 1
  ) +
  labs(color = NULL, shape = NULL)

ggplot(pca_distance, aes(x = time, y = dist)) +
  stat_summary(geom = "col", fun = "mean") +
  geom_point(shape = 21, fill = "white") +
  labs(y = "Euclidean distance from NS")


# cleanup_objects()
```
